about.title: I craft digital products that feel natural and perform well.
about.paragraphOne: My name is Viktor Vítovec (also written as Viktor Vitovec), and I’ve been passionate about technology since childhood. I enjoy creating things that blend design and functionality, from websites and apps to graphics and process automation.
about.paragraphTwo: I’m constantly learning and pushing my skills further because I love solving problems creatively and efficiently. I like combining technical expertise with visual ideas to deliver projects that are meaningful and high-quality.
